title: SEALED_WHISPER not rate-limited; offline queue flood via sealed path
description: ws.rs:1191 — the SEALED_WHISPER handler has a user_exists check and a subscription check but no check_rate_limit call before enqueue. N authenticated senders each at unlimited message rate can fill a recipient's offline queue (1000-message cap per user) via the sealed path. This is the same class of bug as nie-14sh.29 (WHISPER not rate-limited) but on the sealed sender path. Fix: add check_rate_limit call to SEALED_WHISPER at the same position as WHISPER's subscription check, mirroring the pattern used by BROADCAST/GROUP_SEND.
